name: Yogurt-Cucumber Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Coarsely chop the cucumbers.
2. Combine cucumber and onion; set aside.
3. In a small bowl, stir together yogurt, seasonings, and vinegar; beat lightly with a wire whisk until smooth.
4. Stir 1/2 cup of the yogurt dressing into the pasta mixture and toss well.
5. Cover and chill, stirring occasionally.
6. Optionally, add 1 cup cooked macaroni if desired.
